text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After lunch, I find Silence Suzuka staring at her
empty plate.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: My next race is coming up. What to do...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer... I'm trying to decide whether I
should eat dessert or not.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
This time of the year, they have all kinds of
winter-themed sweets. They call it the Snow Fair.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I've ever seen so many gorgeous
frosty treats in one place!
choice_data_list: The presentation makes them look extra tasty!
The presentation makes them look extra tasty!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm especially interested in this one, the Igloo
Jumbo Parfait.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
But with the next race coming up, I have to really
be careful about my intake...
choice_data_list: Don't worry about it. Time to indulge!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Are you sure? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. It's so cute. It's almost a shame to eat it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She was right to be concerned. This parfait must
be packed with calories. The snow is more likely
to give her heartburn than frostbite.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Well if you say so, it must be okay. Right?
choice_data_list: You can run off whatever you eat later.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I can eat as much as I want... and then run as
much as I want.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's a win-win situation, isn't it? Hehe.
